scripts.build:icons: cp node_modules/@phosphor-icons/web/src/regular/style.css docs/css/phosphor.css && cp node_modules/@phosphor-icons/web/src/regular/Phosphor.woff2 docs/css/Phosphor.woff2 && cp node_modules/@phosphor-icons/web/src/regular/Phosphor.woff docs/css/Phosphor.woff && cp node_modules/@phosphor-icons/web/src/regular/Phosphor.ttf docs/css/Phosphor.ttf
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:icons && npm run build:html
scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently "npm run watch:css" "npm run watch:html" "npm run serve"
